title: Request to Link Status and Date Columns for Colour Synchronisation Without Deadline Mode
excerpt: We need the ability to link a Status Column with a Date Column so the Date Column automatically reflects the colour of the Status labels. For example, if the status is green, the Date Column background should appear gree…

posts.author: Asiim99 (Asem Abu Haj)
posts.cookedHtml: We need the ability to link a Status Column with a Date Column so the Date Column automatically reflects the colour of the Status labels. For example, if the status is green, the Date Column background should appear green; if red, it should appear red. This functionality should work without activating Deadline Mode, as the Date Column represents a date rather than a deadline. The feature would improve visual clarity and reporting, aligning with workflows that use dates for milestones or non-deadline purposes.
